name: Iso11783IL_OPGetVTInfo
title: Iso11783IL_OPGetVTInfo
syntax: long Iso11783IL_OPGetVTInfo( dbNode implement, char key[] ); // form 2
description: During initialization phase the Object Pool API request some information about the capabilities from Virtual Terminal. These information can be get with this function.

parameters.name: "NavigationSoftKeyCount"
parameters.description: The number of Physical Soft Keys that are used by the VT for navigation among the Virtual Soft Keys.

parameters.name: "SoftKeyWidth"
parameters.description: Number of pixels on the x-axis for a Soft Key descriptor.

parameters.name: "SoftKeyHeight"
parameters.description: Number of pixels on the y-axis for a Soft Key descriptor.

parameters.name: "VirtualSoftKeyCount"
parameters.description: Number of possible virtual Soft Keys in a Soft Key Mask.

parameters.name: "BootTime"
parameters.description: Maximum number of seconds from a VT power startup.

parameters.name: "Width"
parameters.description: Number of divisions on the horizontal axis in the Data Mask Area.

parameters.name: "Height"
parameters.description: Number of divisions on the vertical axis in the Data Mask Area.

parameters.name: implement
parameters.description: Simulation node to apply the function.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
